title: Revenue OS Health — Layer 7
description: Real-time health of revenue-critical paths: checkout latency, payment webhook errors, throughput, estimated cost against activity.
notes: No confidential customer metrics; aggregated patterns only. Cost values are estimated, not verified.

panels.title: Payment webhook 5xx errors
panels.query: count of error events where url contains '/api/v1/webhooks/' over 1h

panels.title: Webhook signature mismatch
panels.query: count of events where message contains 'moyasar_webhook_bad_signature' over 24h

panels.title: Request throughput
panels.query: count of completed API requests grouped by route over 1h

panels.title: Estimated LLM cost vs activity
panels.query: totals().total_usd from cost_tracker over 24h alongside request count

panels.title: API error rate
panels.query: share of API responses with status >= 500 over 1h
